_comment: Recorded prForCommit responses keyed by commit SHA label. Used by loadHostResponses.ts. Shapes match PullRequest (src/core/types.ts).

squash__squash.title: feat(payments): add idempotency key + amount validation
squash__squash.body:
Adds idempotency key requirement and amount validation to the charge flow.

Closes #17

This prevents double-charge scenarios by requiring callers to supply a unique idempotency key per request.

cherry-pick__original.title: fix(charge): guard against non-positive amounts
cherry-pick__original.body:
Guards the charge function against non-positive amounts.

Closes #23

Without this guard, a zero-amount charge could be processed silently.

cherry-pick__cherry-picked.title: fix(charge): guard against non-positive amounts
cherry-pick__cherry-picked.body:
Guards the charge function against non-positive amounts.

Closes #23

Without this guard, a zero-amount charge could be processed silently.
